integration_validation_v2.evidence: content.rs:1899-1919 (atelier_build_llm_evidence_pack_manifest row, real exports.rs method, schema hsk.atelier.llm_evidence_pack_manifest@1, correctly Planned/ipc_channel None); model_manual_tests.rs:377-381 coverage entry; backend method exists in atelier/exports.rs. Proof is a static-constant manual-row assertion, NOT the contract's advertised 'runtime proof vs PostgreSQL/EventLedger'.

integration_validation_v3.evidence: Closed by tests/atelier_manual_source_rows_pg_tests.rs:66-245 mt074: persists all 4 pack-file payloads via materialize_media_asset against managed PG, re-reads each, 1 MEDIA_ASSET_MATERIALIZED event per payload, manifest from re-read values via real build_llm_evidence_pack_manifest, manual expected_output carries runtime schema id, deterministic order matches recovery_steps, every documented schema_field exists on runtime manifest, 3 documented refusals are real strict-validation errors.
integration_validation_v3.basis: v3 adversarial per-MT review of remediated deliverable + runtime proof via full-crate managed-PG sweep and kernel-builder fresh-DB proof logs
